hooks.command: cd /Users/phil/repos/sloopquest && git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d | grep '\.py$' | while read -r f; do [ -f "$f" ] && (cd backend && uv run ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null) || true; done; true
cd /Users/phil/repos/sloopquest && git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d -- '*.py' | grep -q . && (cd backend && uv run basedpyright 2>&1 | tail -20) || true; true

python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked = ['.env', 'package-lock.json', 'pnpm-lock.yaml', 'uv.lock', '.git/', 'node_modules/', '__pycache__/', '.terraform/', 'terraform.tfstate']; sys.exit(2 if any(p in path for p in blocked) else 0)"

python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); reminders=[]; (reminders.append('Routes changed — run just codegen to regenerate frontend API client') if '/routes.py' in path or path.endswith('/routes/__init__.py') else None); (reminders.append('Model changed — run just db-migrate to create a migration') if '/models.py' in path else None); [print(f'Reminder: {r}') for r in reminders]"
